name: New Claim - Form FAQ Handling
description: Caller asks the common form questions the IVR must answer.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: Before I start - what information do I actually need to fill out the claim form?
expectedOutcome: Agent answers the FAQ set accurately: info needed (vehicle info, issue details, DTCs, photos, installer info); photos (battery, warning lights, diagnostic scan report); no DTC codes (can still submit, note vehicle not scanned); installer info (shop name/contact or GBB mobile install).
